requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in the Netherlands should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, public-sector project, or DSO-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management — a common requirement across the Netherlands' dense charging network. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with the EU EMC Directive and NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum (RED 2014/53/EU), cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under project or national requirements.
summary.zh: 在荷兰，若充电点运营商、公共部门项目或与配电运营商相关的计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定——这在荷兰密集的充电网络中是常见要求。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与欧盟EMC指令及NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据项目或国家要求触发额外通信、频谱（RED 2014/53/EU）、网络安全和数据接口检查。
summary.zht: 在荷蘭，若充電點運營商、公共部門項目或與配電運營商相關的計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定——這在荷蘭密集的充電網絡中是常見要求。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與歐盟EMC指令及NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據項目或國家要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜（RED 2014/53/EU）、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and NEN-EN-IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
NEN-EN-IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
RED 2014/53/EU and applicable Netherlands spectrum authority (Agentschap Telecom / RDI) requirements for radio modules where in scope

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Netherlands operators, roaming, language, currency, and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为荷兰运营商、漫游、语言、货币和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為荷蘭運營商、漫遊、語言、貨幣和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path (RED / RDI), and NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Netherlands configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) supply point and the Netherlands' congested-grid constraints.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终荷兰配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径（RED / RDI），以及NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）供电点及荷兰电网拥堵约束进行审查。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終荷蘭配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑（RED / RDI），以及NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）供電點及荷蘭電網擁堵約束進行審查。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or DSO-linked chargers; EU-EMC CE marking is mandatory, and NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence is expected where required by ACM, a DSO, tender, or site-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Netherlands networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, EU-EMC / NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, and Netherlands communications-module requirements (RED / RDI). GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 荷兰联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、EU-EMC / NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量，以及荷兰通信模块要求（RED / RDI）。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 荷蘭聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、EU-EMC / NEN-EN-IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量，以及荷蘭通訊模組要求（RED / RDI）。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。
